chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No.S-388 of 2025. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For orders on CMA No.3287/2025. 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 4 a/w reply of advocate as at ‘A’. 3. For orders on CMA No.3288/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 06.05.2025. Mr. Behram Khan A. Ujjan, Advocate for the Petitioner. ************ 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he will avail proper remedy by filing an application under Section 491 Cr.P.C. before the Court having jurisdiction, therefore he does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, it stands dismissed along with pending application(s). JUDGE Shahbaz
